nasb.text: So he was an adversary to Israel all the days of Solomon, along with the evil that Hadad did; and he abhorred Israel and reigned over Aram.

esv.text: He was an adversary of Israel all the days of Solomon, doing harm as Hadad did. And he loathed Israel and reigned over Syria.

cnv.text: 在所羅門一生的日子，利遜都敵擋以色列人。他恨惡以色列人，並且作了亞蘭人的王。另外，哈達也不斷為患。

ccb.text: 所罗门活着的时候，哈达和利逊不断为患。利逊统治亚兰，他憎恨以色列人。
